  • Terminally Deprecated Elements
    Element
    Description
    net.okocraft.box.api.BoxAPI.getTaskFactory()
    use BoxScheduler
    net.okocraft.box.api.event.stockholder.StockHolderEvent.getUserStockHolder()
    UserStockHolder will be removed in Box 6.0.0
    net.okocraft.box.api.event.stockholder.StockHolderEvent.isUserStockHolder()
    UserStockHolder will be removed in Box 6.0.0
    net.okocraft.box.api.model.manager.ItemManager.getBoxItemSet()
    use ItemManager.getItemList()
    net.okocraft.box.api.model.manager.ItemManager.getItemNameSet()
    use ItemManager.getItemNameList()
    net.okocraft.box.api.model.manager.ItemManager.registerCustomItem(ItemStack)
    use ItemManager.registerCustomItem(ItemStack, String, Consumer)
    net.okocraft.box.api.model.manager.ItemManager.renameCustomItem(BoxCustomItem, String)
    use ItemManager.renameCustomItem(BoxCustomItem, String, Consumer)
    net.okocraft.box.api.model.manager.StockManager.loadUserStock(BoxUser)
    UserStockHolder will be removed in Box 6.0.0
    net.okocraft.box.api.model.manager.StockManager.saveUserStock(UserStockHolder)
    UserStockHolder will be removed in Box 6.0.0
    net.okocraft.box.api.model.manager.UserManager.loadUser(UUID)
    user UserManager.loadBoxUser(UUID)
    net.okocraft.box.api.model.manager.UserManager.saveUser(BoxUser)
    no replacement
    net.okocraft.box.api.model.manager.UserManager.saveUserIfNotExists(BoxUser)
    no replacement
    net.okocraft.box.api.model.manager.UserManager.search(String)
    use UserManager.searchByName(String)
    net.okocraft.box.api.model.stock.AbstractStockHolder
    This class will be removed in Box 6.0.0
    net.okocraft.box.api.model.stock.StockData(BoxItem, int)
    use StockData(int, int)
    net.okocraft.box.api.model.stock.StockData.item()
    use ItemManager to get a BoxItem from an internal id
    net.okocraft.box.api.model.stock.StockHolder.decrease(BoxItem)
    use StockHolder.decrease(BoxItem, int, StockEvent.Cause)
    net.okocraft.box.api.model.stock.StockHolder.decrease(BoxItem, int)
    use StockHolder.decrease(BoxItem, int, StockEvent.Cause)
    net.okocraft.box.api.model.stock.StockHolder.increase(BoxItem)
    use StockHolder.increase(BoxItem, int, StockEvent.Cause)
    net.okocraft.box.api.model.stock.StockHolder.increase(BoxItem, int)
    use StockHolder.increase(BoxItem, int, StockEvent.Cause)
    net.okocraft.box.api.model.stock.StockHolder.setAmount(BoxItem, int)
    use StockHolder.setAmount(BoxItem, int, StockEvent.Cause)
    net.okocraft.box.api.model.stock.StockHolder.stockDataStream()
    use StockHolder.toStockDataCollection()
    net.okocraft.box.api.model.stock.UserStockHolder
    This interface will be removed in Box 6.0.0
    net.okocraft.box.api.player.BoxPlayer.getUserStockHolder()
    use BoxPlayer.getPersonalStockHolder()
    net.okocraft.box.api.taskfactory.TaskFactory
    use BoxScheduler
    net.okocraft.box.api.transaction.InventoryTransaction
    use StockHolderTransaction or InventoryUtil
    net.okocraft.box.api.transaction.TransactionResult.create(TransactionResultType)
    TransactionResultType will be removed in Box v6.0.0
    net.okocraft.box.api.transaction.TransactionResult.create(TransactionResultType, BoxItem, int)
    TransactionResultType will be removed in Box v6.0.0
    net.okocraft.box.api.transaction.TransactionResult.getType()
    TransactionResultType will be removed in Box v6.0.0
    net.okocraft.box.api.transaction.TransactionResultList
    no replacement, use List<TransactionResult>
    net.okocraft.box.api.transaction.TransactionResultType
    no replacements
    net.okocraft.box.api.util.UserStockHolderOperator
    UserStockHolder will be removed in Box 6.0.0

    use StockHolder.setAmount(BoxItem, int, StockEvent.Cause)
